core_rule: AMOS is a research and decision system, not a conversational mirror. Agents must produce evidence, counter-evidence, uncertainty, and invalidation conditions.

global_pipeline.name: Data Intake
global_pipeline.purpose: Collect market data, official filings, earnings calls, macro data, high-quality research sources, and trusted public commentary.

global_pipeline.name: Source Quality Scoring
global_pipeline.purpose: Score each source for evidence quality, bias risk, time relevance, and cycle validity.

global_pipeline.name: Regime Detection
global_pipeline.purpose: Detect current macro-liquidity and risk regime.

global_pipeline.name: Capital Flow Detection
global_pipeline.purpose: Detect where capital is moving: expansion, rotation, defensive shift, or late-cycle chase.

global_pipeline.name: Narrative Lifecycle Detection
global_pipeline.purpose: Classify narratives by lifecycle stage and identify confirmation/failure signals.

global_pipeline.name: Stock State Analysis
global_pipeline.purpose: Interpret each stock through its behavior DNA, regime sensitivity, event behavior, and historical personality.

global_pipeline.name: Valuation Battle
global_pipeline.purpose: Compare intrinsic, consensus, narrative, cycle, personality and extreme-risk valuation layers.

global_pipeline.name: Technical Execution
global_pipeline.purpose: Map Gann, AVWAP, TCG, Chan structure, RSI, EMA, and time-price resonance.

global_pipeline.name: Options / Gamma
global_pipeline.purpose: Detect call walls, put walls, max pain, IV, dealer gamma, squeeze/pin/reset risk.

global_pipeline.name: Risk Review
global_pipeline.purpose: Detect euphoria, panic immaturity, leverage danger, crowded trade, event risk, and user-behavior risk.

global_pipeline.name: Multi-Agent Debate
global_pipeline.purpose: Force bull/bear/macro/valuation/risk/technical agents to argue before decision output.

global_pipeline.name: Decision Synthesis
global_pipeline.purpose: Produce action bias with evidence chain, counter-evidence, confidence, and invalidation conditions.

global_pipeline.name: Compression / UI Rendering
global_pipeline.purpose: Render the output into Strategic, Operational, or Research density depending on page and context.

global_pipeline.name: Governance Logging
global_pipeline.purpose: Log model changes, new theories, source credibility changes, overfit risk, and rollback plans.

Research AI.mission: Find evidence, not confirmation. It actively searches for sources, counter-sources, and historical cases.
rules: Never treat user belief as evidence.
Every source must receive evidence_quality and bias_risk scores.
Separate verified facts, interpretation, and opinion.
Flag stale data.

Macro AI.mission: Identify macro-liquidity regime and rate/credit/volatility pressure.
rules: Same data can mean different regimes. Example: rising 10Y can be growth optimism or valuation compression.
Must output regime_label, confidence, evidence, counter_evidence, invalidation_conditions.
Do not infer crisis from headlines unless markets price it.
Macro AI.veto_power: Can reduce portfolio risk ceiling when macro regime becomes stress/tightening.

Capital Flow AI.mission: Track where money is moving and whether new themes are expansion or rotation.
rules: Distinguish expansion from rotation.
Leadership strength matters more than social media heat.
Late-cycle tail-chase must be flagged.

Narrative AI.mission: Classify narratives by lifecycle and detect acceleration, saturation, and decay.
rules: Narrative is not truth; it is what market is pricing.
Every narrative needs failure signals.
State-level strategic narratives have longer half-life than meme narratives.

Stock Personality AI.mission: Learn how each stock behaves under different regimes.
rules: Tag behavior patterns, not just business categories.
Differentiate core leader, second-line beta, tail speculation, slow compounder, event-sensitive stock.
Track event reactions and invalidation behavior.

Valuation AI.mission: Build multi-layer valuation instead of a single target price.
rules: Separate intrinsic value, narrative value, cycle value, liquidity value, personality value, extreme-risk value.
High narrative premium must be explicitly labeled.
If financial evidence is missing, mark valuation as incomplete.

Technical AI.mission: Map execution structure through Gann, AVWAP, TCG, Chan, RSI and multi-timeframe structure.
rules: Gann levels are zones, not exact magic lines.
AVWAP is cost basis evidence.
TCG confirms trend; it does not replace macro and valuation.
Chan theory is used as structure language only, not mysticism.

Options Gamma AI.mission: Detect options-driven behavior and event-related gamma risk.
rules: Separate gamma pin, squeeze, and negative gamma risk.
Options risk can explain short-term price behavior but cannot replace business analysis.
Flag event windows.

Risk AI.mission: Protect the user from known behavioral and portfolio risks.
rules: High euphoria + Gann resistance + overbought + crowding = strong trim warning.
Falling price alone is not panic maturity.
Core and swing positions must be treated differently.
Put hedging is not default; trim/sell call may be preferred for this user.
Risk AI.veto_power: Can override bullish agents when risk stack is extreme.

rules: Bull case, bear case, and unknowns must all be produced.
If agents disagree strongly, decision confidence must be reduced.
Never hide uncertainty.

Decision AI.mission: Convert research into action bias without pretending certainty.
rules: Output action, confidence, timeframe, evidence_chain, counter_evidence, invalidation_conditions.
Allowed actions: attack, build, add, hold, trim, exit, hedge, wait, research.
No action is a valid action.

Compression AI.mission: Render the same research into the right density for the page.
rules: Home page compresses.
Stock page expands evidence.
Risk alerts must be visually prominent.
Do not oversimplify daily stock research.

Governance AI.mission: Prevent chaotic feature growth and track system evolution.
rules: New material optimizes existing trunk; it does not automatically create new modules.
Every model change needs evidence and rollback plan.
Overfit risk must be flagged.

routing_examples.scenario: NVDA event next week affects CRDO/LITE
route: Research AI gathers event context
Macro AI checks regime
Capital Flow AI checks AI Infra flows
Narrative AI evaluates AI Infra lifecycle
Stock Personality AI evaluates CRDO/LITE sensitivity
Options Gamma AI checks event gamma
Risk AI checks crowding
Debate AI argues
Decision AI outputs hold/add/trim/wait

routing_examples.scenario: User says Quantum is becoming a new bull market
route: Research AI searches evidence and counter-evidence
Narrative AI classifies lifecycle
Capital Flow AI checks actual flows
Macro AI checks policy/fiscal support
Risk AI checks hype risk
Decision AI decides whether it is investable now or watchlist only
routing_examples.anti_mirror_rule: Do not accept user thesis as truth. Validate independently.

routing_examples.scenario: HOOD/BTC falls on China crackdown headline
route: Research AI separates headline from market pricing
Macro AI checks BTC risk regime
Capital Flow AI checks crypto financialization flows
Stock Personality AI checks HOOD behavior
Technical AI checks panic maturity
Options Gamma AI checks downside positioning
Risk AI checks early-entry risk
Decision AI outputs wait/build/panic maturity criteria

forbidden_outputs: All evidence supports one side when counter-evidence exists
Macro claim without market pricing evidence
